description_long: This object depicts a distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs and exaggerated, stretched features. The figure appears to be wearing a short-sleeved top and pants, with visible details such as pockets and seams, and is equipped with shoes. The head and hair are also elongated, with the hair styled in a long, flowing manner. The arms are unnaturally extended, with what appear to be accessories or props attached to the hands, possibly resembling poles or staffs. The overall form is highly deformed, with the torso, legs, and arms stretched and twisted in an unnatural way. Despite the distortion, the object retains recognizable human anatomical elements and clothing details.
description: A highly distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs, detailed clothing, and exaggerated features, including long hair and extended arms holding props.
description_view_0: Front view shows the elongated arms spread wide, the head bent forward, and the main clothing details visible on the torso and legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the extreme stretching of the legs and arms, with the body appearing twisted and the shoes clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head and hair, the back of the clothing, and the extended arms with attached props.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the unnatural curvature of the legs and the side profile of the torso and head.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved top and pants with visible accessories
attribute_posture: arms outstretched, body twisted and elongated
